findings.description: Protocol count CI test breaks predictably every time a protocol is added
findings.proposedRule: Update EXPECTED_PROTO_COUNT in same commit as new protocol file

findings.description: Separate headless constraint blocks contradict existing interactive blocks
findings.proposedRule: Branch within existing constraint blocks for modal behavior

findings.description: headless-result.json not written on abort paths (sw-ship, sw-status)
findings.proposedRule: Every headless exit path must write the result file

findings.description: Opencode run mode loads npm plugin skills but not local .opencode/commands/
findings.proposedRule: Non-interactive features use npm plugin path, not project-local commands

findings.description: Headless detection at first decision point means clean runs never detect
findings.proposedRule: Probe at skill startup, not lazily at first decision
